name: MAX Finder
description: Free MAX JEUNE / MAX SENIOR (ex-TGVmax) seat availability from SNCF open data. Static, serverless, no accounts.

params.to: destination station id (in tour mode: optional finish city; = from for a loop)
params.type: axis: SUD EST | ATLANTIQUE | NORD | EST
params.flex: 1 | 2 | 3 | 7 (also search +/- N days around date; mode=od/from/to/tour)
params.rdate: YYYY-MM-DD (return date for a round trip; mode=od)
params.legs: ~-separated from>to@YYYY-MM-DD hops for an explicit multi-city itinerary (mode=tour)
params.span: integer (max journey length in days; mode=od)
params.rad: integer 10-300 (search radius in km for nearby paid-connection alternatives; mode=od)
params.night: 1 to allow long overnight layovers at a hub
params.onlynight: 1 to keep only journeys arriving on a night train
params.rt: 1 for round-trip getaways: day trips + N-night escapes (mode=from or best)
params.nights: integer 1-3 (nights away for a getaway; mode=from/best with rt=1)
params.fn: 1 for flexible nights (0-3, best per destination; with rt=1)
params.stayh: integer 1-12 (min hours on site for a same-day getaway; with rt=1)
params.late: 1 to allow a late return on a getaway (with rt=1)
params.cities: ~-separated station ids to visit (mode=tour, plan surface)
params.dmin: integer (min days per city; mode=tour, default 1)
params.dmax: integer (max days per city; mode=tour, default 3)
params.maxkm: integer (cap on the tour's total straight-line distance in km; mode=tour)
params.legkm: integer (cap on each hop's straight-line distance in km; mode=tour)
params.by: YYYY-MM-DD (tour finish-by date; mode=tour with a finish city)
params.sort: rec | trains | days | closest | fastest | name (result ordering)
params.lang: UI language: fr | en | es | de | it | pt | nl | ko | ja | zh | ar
